StoryStream hazard tape — jelly mint + ultraviolet on newsprint-black canvas.

02 / Typography

Typography Scale

THE VERGE
Manuka substitute — shout headline
14:32 · COMMIT
PolySans Mono substitute — timeline rail
Google's AI pivot lands in Congress
PolySans tile headline
Saturation blocks replace gradients — mint borders fence each StoryStream row.
Reading deck
